summary: Diff appears to introduce a new backend search result shape that includes a Principal and updates Explore to call follow/unfollow/startConversation using Principal text, with toast-based English error messages. However, the provided backend/main.mo and ExplorePage.tsx diffs are truncated, so several acceptance-criteria behaviors cannot be conclusively verified from the evidence shown. Also, a migration module was added/wired that is not requested by REQ-8/9/10.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes a query method that returns search results including each matched user's Principal (UserId) along with the user’s profile fields needed by the Explore UI; callable by authenticated users with same permissions as existing searchUsers; no stable data changes required.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo shows a new type UserSearchResult { principal; profile } but the actual searchUsers query method implementation/signature and its permission checks are not visible in the truncated diff, so it cannot be verified that the API now returns Principals and remains authenticated-only as required.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; shows `public type UserSearchResult = { principal : Principal; profile : UserProfile; };` but not the `searchUsers` method)
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts (expects `actor.searchUsers(searchTerm)` to return `UserSearchResult[]`, implying a backend change, but backend implementation not shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Explore follow/unfollow UI is enabled for other users (disabled only while mutation in-flight) and the current user cannot follow themselves (no follow button shown).
missing_requirements.reason: ExplorePage.tsx is truncated before the rendering of results/actions, so there is no direct evidence of (a) hiding the follow button for the signed-in user and (b) the exact disabled-state logic tied only to in-flight mutations.
evidence: frontend/src/explore/ExplorePage.tsx (truncated; handlers exist, but results list/button rendering not shown)

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced a migration module and wired migration into the Motoko actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8/9/10 are about search results including Principal and wiring Explore follow/unfollow/chat; they do not request adding upgrade migration scaffolding or a new migration.mo module.
evidence: backend/main.mo (imports `Migration "migration";` and includes `(with migration = Migration.run)` at actor start)
